_meta.note: LTC-SP uses identical algorithm to BIP-352. Only the HMAC domain tags differ: LTCSP/SharedSecret vs BIP0352/SharedSecret. Performance numbers are therefore directly comparable to BIP-352 benchmarks.

ltcsp_create_output.note: 1 sender input key, k=0..99 averaged. CT ECDH + ct::generator_mul + SHA256 midstate. Equivalent to BIP-352 silent_payment_create_output.

ltcsp_scan.note: 100 P2TR outputs scanned per call, 1 match found. SHA256 midstate amortized across all outputs. Equivalent to BIP-352 silent_payment_scan.

ltcsp_paycode_encode.note: ltcsp1... bech32m paycode encoding of (scan_pk, spend_pk) pair.

comparison_bip352.note: BIP-352 numbers from bench_ltc_doge_2026-05-18.json (LTC native harness).
comparison_bip352.conclusion: LTC-SP create is within 0.7% of BIP-352 create — confirms identical algorithm, only HMAC tag strings differ.
